narrative:
Northwest Local Sd (Hamilton) school district has 54,699 registered voters, with 57.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.1%, a clear Republican lean of 6.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +0.0% D−R vs -17.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
